title: verbascum × intermedium
intro: Verbascum × intermedium, a hybrid of the Verbascum species, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mullein family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and improving sleep quality. Verbascum × intermedium can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or topical salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
